description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent, dark gabled roof and natural wood exterior walls, evoking a rustic yet modern charm. The roof extends over a covered porch area, supported by wooden posts, providing a sheltered entryway. Large windows wrap around the corners of the building, allowing ample natural light into the interior and offering expansive views. The foundation is bordered by stone or concrete trim, adding both stability and visual contrast to the wooden facade. The building sits on a circular grassy plot, suggesting a suburban or park-like setting. The overall design is compact, with a focus on horizontal lines and a welcoming, homey appearance.
description: A single-story wooden bungalow with a dark gabled roof, large corner windows, and a covered porch, set on a grassy circular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and prominent gabled roof.
description_view_1: Corner view highlighting the large wraparound windows and the intersection of rooflines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extended roof and a long, windowless wall with a covered walkway.
description_view_3: Back corner view showing the solid wooden wall and the continuation of the roof structure.
